title.rationale: Canonical identifier for the research work.

year.rationale: Provides context regarding the recency of the research.

abstract.rationale: Gives a concise overview of the research focus and findings.

doi.rationale: Unique identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.rationale: Indicates the platform of dissemination and peer review.

problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the specific issue the research addresses.

methodology.description: Overview of the methods used in the research
methodology.rationale: Essential for understanding how the research was conducted.

approach.description: Type of approach used (e.g., algorithm, framework)
approach.rationale: Defines the foundational strategy employed in the research.

feature_extraction.description: Methods for extracting features from data
feature_extraction.rationale: Critical for understanding the data representation used.

importance_resampling.rationale: Indicates a key technique in the proposed methodology.

experiments.rationale: Provides insight into the validation of the proposed method.

datasets.rationale: Essential for reproducibility and context of results.

evaluation_metrics.rationale: Defines the criteria for assessing the method's effectiveness.

results.rationale: Highlights the outcomes and significance of findings.

average_accuracy.rationale: Quantifies the performance of the proposed method.

kl_reduction.rationale: Indicates how well the selected data matches the target distribution.

reproducibility_metadata.description: Metadata for ensuring reproducibility of results
reproducibility_metadata.rationale: Critical for validating the research findings.

code_repository.rationale: Allows others to access and replicate the work.

data_access.rationale: Essential for understanding how to obtain the datasets used.

discussion.description: Key discussions and implications of the findings
discussion.rationale: Provides insight into the broader impact of the research.

limitations.rationale: Acknowledges potential weaknesses in the research.

future_work.rationale: Guides subsequent investigations in the field.
